testcase.name: verifyUserAbleToManageAdminUserPage

failure.message: The supplied file was empty (zero bytes long)

testcase.failure: org.apache.poi.EmptyFileException: The supplied file was empty (zero bytes long) at org.apache.poi.util.IOUtils.peekFirstNBytes(IOUtils.java:157) at org.apache.poi.poifs.filesystem.FileMagic.valueOf(FileMagic.java:209) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.internal.ZipHelper.verifyZipHeader(ZipHelper.java:147) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.internal.ZipHelper.openZipStream(ZipHelper.java:191) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.ZipPackage.<init>(ZipPackage.java:210) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.OPCPackage.open(OPCPackage.java:517) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.OPCPackage.open(OPCPackage.java:490) at org.apache.poi.ooxml.util.PackageHelper.open(PackageHelper.java:67) at org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFWorkbook.<init>(XSSFWorkbook.java:315) at org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFWorkbook.<init>(XSSFWorkbook.java:289) at utilities.ExcelUtility.getStringData(ExcelUtility.java:23) at testscript.AdnimUsersTest.verifyUserAbleToManageAdminUserPage(AdnimUsersTest.java:22) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:572) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) ... Removed 11 stack frames

testcase.name: verifyuserabletomanagecategorysuccessfully

failure.message: No valid entries or contents found, this is not a valid OOXML (Office Open XML) file

testcase.failure: org.apache.poi.openxml4j.exceptions.NotOfficeXmlFileException: No valid entries or contents found, this is not a valid OOXML (Office Open XML) file at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.ZipPackage.getPartsImpl(ZipPackage.java:400) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.OPCPackage.getParts(OPCPackage.java:950) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.OPCPackage.open(OPCPackage.java:523) at org.apache.poi.openxml4j.opc.OPCPackage.open(OPCPackage.java:490) at org.apache.poi.ooxml.util.PackageHelper.open(PackageHelper.java:67) at org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFWorkbook.<init>(XSSFWorkbook.java:315) at org.apache.poi.xssf.usermodel.XSSFWorkbook.<init>(XSSFWorkbook.java:289) at utilities.ExcelUtility.getStringData(ExcelUtility.java:23) at testscript.ManageCategoryTest.verifyuserabletomanagecategorysuccessfully(ManageCategoryTest.java:21) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:572) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) ... testcase.name: verifyUserIsAbleToLogout
testcase.failure: java.io.IOException: Stream Closed at java.base/java.io.FileInputStream.readBytes(Native Method) at java.base/java.io.FileInputStream.read(FileInputStream.java:287) at
